title: AI Pixel RPG 8-Bit
description: Transforms the photo into a retro 16-bit pixel art character and scene.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a retro 16-bit fantasy RPG pixel-art scene. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identities, key facial features, pose, camera angle, and main composition. Use a limited but vibrant color palette, distinct pixel textures, clean grid alignment, readable silhouettes, and pixel dithering for shading. Emulate the mood of classic 1990s console role-playing games without adding UI text.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, photographic look, high resolution, smooth gradients, 3D render, bad anatomy, malformed hands, distorted faces, low quality, blurry
